apiBoundary: external calls go through a typed client/service layer — no inline httpx/requests in routers

researchLayers.name: routers
researchLayers.targets: app/routers/, path operations, dependencies (Depends), status codes

researchLayers.name: services-data
researchLayers.targets: app/store.py, business logic, the data boundary

_notes: Live config for the examples/fastapi-todo demo. jira.mode is 'none', so stage 1 reads the ticket from tickets/active/ instead of Jira.
Stack managed with uv: 'uv sync' installs from the lockfile; 'uv run <tool>' runs inside the project venv.
INTEGRATION_TEST is wired (pytest -m integration) but this trivial app has no integration tests yet — the marker is registered in pyproject.toml.
